scripts.dev-pk: run-s build && pkexec --keep-cwd env DISPLAY=$DISPLAY WAYLAND_DISPLAY=$WAYLAND_DISPLAY XAUTHORITY=$XAUTHORITY XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR ./dist/qode ./dist/main.js
scripts.blob:linux: npm-run-all build fetch-qode:linux && rm -f payload.bin && node scripts/generateBlob.js linux
scripts.publish:linux: npm-run-all build-sea:linux && mkdir -p publish && cp sea/build/out publish/seraphimcms-linux-installer
scripts.blob:win32: npm-run-all build fetch-qode:win32 && rm -f payload.bin && node scripts/generateBlob.js win32
scripts.publish:win32: npm-run-all build-sea:win32 && mkdir -p publish && cp sea/build/out.exe publish/seraphimcms-win32-installer.exe
